Hands-on Fabricator · Build Technician

I am a fabricator who builds with metal, wood, fiberglass, and circuitry. This is a working record of what I've made: large-scale structural fabrication, custom hardwood furniture.

Selected work
The Water Temple
2025 · Santa Rosa / Black Rock Desert · 3-week build

Project manager and lead fabricator on a large-scale structural art installation at Burning Man. Within a day of joining, took full ownership and began coordinating the artist, sponsors, co-artists, and volunteers while fabricating welding jigs, installing and calibrating a CNC fiber laser from scratch, and managing materials sourcing on a compressed 3-week schedule. Every structural component delivered on time with zero rework at installation.

MIG welding CNC fiber laser welding fixture design structural fabrication project management materials sourcing steel aluminum
Custom Furniture
2024–2026 · Sebastopol / Petaluma, CA

Designed and built custom hardwood furniture to client specifications. Work through the full process from slab selection and milling, through hand-tool finishing. My work spans live-edge slabs with epoxy fills, solid joinery, and mixed-species construction using walnut, cherry, hickory, sapele, and spalted hardwoods.

fine woodworking hardwood & slab selection hand tool work custom joinery production machinery epoxy & resin work
Capabilities
Fabrication
MIG & oxy-acetylene welding, CNC fiber laser (setup, calibration, operation, maintenance), manual lathe & mill, fiberglass layup & finishing, metal fabrication & finishing, welding jig design
Electronics
PCB prototyping & design, low-voltage circuit assembly & troubleshooting, soldering (PCB & harness), wiring diagram interpretation, multimeter & test equipment
Tools & CAD
SolidWorks, AutoCAD, hand tools (precision & production), mechanical drawing interpretation, heavy equipment operation
Materials
Metals & composites, hardwoods & slabs, fiberglass & resins, epoxy, hardware selection & sourcing
Process
Project management, cross-team coordination, materials procurement, rapid iteration
